query:
-- Check Efrat's profile
SELECT id, name, "preferredCity", "locationMode", "searchRadiusKm",
       "workerLocation"::text, "workerLatitude", "workerLongitude"
FROM users
WHERE name ILIKE '%אפרת%' AND "userMode" = 'worker'
LIMIT 5;

-- Check job 60011
SELECT id, city, category, latitude, longitude, "jobLocationMode"
FROM jobs
WHERE id = 60011;
